channel.title: Blog on Xiaoxuan Zhao
channel.description: Recent content in Blog on Xiaoxuan Zhao

item.title: Time Is a Snake Biting Its Own Tail
item.description: Márquez lays out a peculiar notion of time in the rise and fall of the Buendía family.

item.title: In Defence of Useless Knowledge
item.description: Whenever someone asks what my studies are good for, I think of that tree in Zhuangzi.
